actionUnits.condition: Precondition/setup for Fire script (MonoBehaviour guid: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d). The object has a BoxCollider and no Rigidbody; Trigger is valid. Scene settings: isOn=0, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60 (Awake overrides timeToOn to Random[40,60]), onNeighborsThreshold=2, maxNeighborDistance=4, minNeighborDownDistance=3, downMultiplier=2, totalHitTime=5, maxHitInterval=2. Particle system is mainEffectGo(fileID: 1849464941111748095). To exercise turning-off logic we need the fire to be ON first. Ensure either: (A) neighbors have already turned this fire on and notified via NotifyNeighborState, or (B) allow a one-time test harness override to set Fire.isOn=true (e.g., via SetIsOn(true)) before the next step.

Exercise WaterHit/turning-off path. While fire is ON, repeatedly hit this object with water such that calls to IWaterInteractable.WaterHit(Vector3 normal) occur at intervals < maxHitInterval (2s) until accumulated currentHitTime >= totalHitTime (5s). Expected during Update: isTurningOff=true, currentHitInterval resets on each hit; when currentHitTime>=5s, fire turns OFF (isOn=false, shouldTurnOn=false, timeToOnDelta=0), UpdateFireState(true) is invoked, ParticleSystem stops, and FireController.Instance.FireChanged(-1) is called.

Exercise neighbor-driven auto ignition path. Ensure at least two neighbor Fire instances are within maxNeighborDistance (4) of this object and notify this instance as ON (NotifyNeighborState(true) twice so onNeighbors >= onNeighborsThreshold=2). Optionally place at least one neighbor lower by > minNeighborDownDistance (3) so hasDownNeighbor=true and downMultiplier=2 accelerates the timer. After CheckNeighborState sets shouldTurnOn=true, allow time to pass until timeToOnDelta >= timeToOn. Note Awake sets timeToOn randomly in [40,60]; with hasDownNeighbor, effective wait may halve. Use 61s to cover worst case. Expected when threshold/time satisfied: isOn becomes true, UpdateFireState(true) plays ParticleSystem and calls FireController.Instance.FireChanged(+1).
